option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@drawable/bottom_sheet_bg" android:padding="20dp">
<!-- Header --> <RelativeLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_centerInParent="true" android:text="Ghi lại cân nặng" android:textColor="@color/wao_slate_900" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/btnClose" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_centerVertical="true" android:src="@drawable/ic_close" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:tint="@color/wao_slate_900"/> </RelativeLayout>
<!-- Photo box (center) --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp">
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#F8F9FA">
<ImageView android:layout_width="60dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:src="@drawable/ic_image" app:tint="#B0BEC5"/> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAddPhoto" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="+ Thêm ảnh chụp" android:textColor="@color/green_primary" android:textSize="14sp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:textStyle="bold" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Weight Title --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Cân nặng hiện tại" android:textColor="@color/wao_slate_900" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:gravity="center" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Mục tiêu: 60Kg" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="12sp" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp"/>
<!-- Weight adjuster --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/btnMinus" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_minus" android:padding="8dp" android:background="@drawable/circle_primary_alpha" app:tint="@color/green_dark" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true"/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCurrentWeight" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="51 Kg" android:textColor="@color/wao_slate_900" android:textSize="36sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginHorizontal="24dp" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/btnPlus" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_add" android:padding="8dp" android:background="@drawable/circle_primary_alpha" app:tint="@color/green_dark" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true"/> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="#E0E0E0" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp"/>
<!-- Date Picker Row --> <RelativeLayout android:id="@+id/layoutDate" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:paddingVertical="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Ngày cân" android:textColor="@color/wao_slate_900" android:textSize="14sp" android:layout_centerVertical="true"/>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_centerVertical="true">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDateDisplay" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="31 / 03 / 2026" android:textColor="@color/wao_slate_900" android:textSize="14sp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp"/>
<ImageView android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="20dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_calendar" app:tint="@color/wao_slate_900"/> </LinearLayout> </RelativeLayout>
<!-- Save Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnSaveWeight" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:text="Lưu cân nặng" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:backgroundTint="@color/green_primary" app:cornerRadius="28dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
